summary: Classified the five open inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive refs were present. No close, merge, or fix actions are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled for this job; useful PRs with failing proof/checks or unresolved review-bot findings are kept open or routed for maintainer judgment only where the job explicitly requires it.
